comment: Free Text injection through autoseq queue. FT is HIGHEST priority — guarantees the next TX is the FT, preempting any active QSO. After FT TX, the QSO ctx (preserved) resumes. Covers: (1) empty queue — FT fires in next slot via fallback parity; (2) active QSO — FT preempts and fires immediately, QSO resumes after; (3) one-shot semantics — FT ctx evicted after single TX.

periods.comment: Period 0 (even): empty queue, inject FT. Should fire in next TX slot.
Period 2 (even): FT was one-shot, queue empty.
Period 3 (odd): DX CQ arrives. Touch to start a QSO.
Period 4 (even): we TX1 (grid) to DX. Queue parity = even.
Period 5 (odd): inject FT while QSO is in REPLYING. FT inherits queue parity (even), preempts at queue front. NEXT TX should be FT, not QSO retry.
Period 6 (even): FT TX (preempts QSO retry). Queue: [FT first, then QSO]. After FT TX, FT is popped by tick.
Period 7 (odd): RX slot — DX may send us TX2 (report) since they got our TX1 from period 4.
Period 9 (odd): DX sends 73 — terminal, QSO evicted.
